title: Limnochloa tumida
taxonomy: Limnochloa tumida is classified within the family Poaceae, which includes various types of grasses. More specifically, it belongs to the subfamily Bambusoideae, commonly known as bamboo grasses. This classification suggests that Limnochloa tumida shares characteristics with other bamboo grasses, such as its growth habit and leaf structure. The genus Limnochloa is thought to be a monotypic genus, meaning it contains only one species. Further research is needed to confirm the precise classification and relationships of Limnochloa tumida within the plant kingdom.
